scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run validate:html && npm run check:spell
scripts.check:js: node --check js/main.js && node --check js/three-scene.js && node --check js/firebase-config.js && node --check js/admin.js
scripts.check:spell: npx --yes cspell index.html admin.html archives.html eduventure.html README.md js/*.js css/styles.css
scripts.validate:html: npx --yes html-validate index.html admin.html archives.html eduventure.html
scripts.deploy:functions: node -e "console.log('No Firebase Functions are configured for this static portfolio; skipping functions deploy.')"
